question.q: What did Saw Gerrera use as a torturing device in a Star Wars spinoff movie from 2016?
What was Scarlett Johansson's superhero name in the Marvel Cinematic Universe?
In the movie "I, Robot" from 2004, Asimov's laws of robotics are cited. Now, what does his zeroth law say?
Who played James Bond in the movie in which the climax take place in outer space?
Actor George Lazenby played James Bond in how many movies?
In Avengers: Endgame, the Scarlett Johansson character died to obtain which inifinity stone?
"Love, Actually" features a cover song called "Christmas is All Around." What was the original song title?
Name the actor who played Green Lantern in the DCEU and then played Deadpool in the MCU.
In Bean the movie, Mr Bean works for which gallery?
Who plays the Wizard of Oz in Wicked the movie?
In Miyazaki's Spirited Away, what is the name of the old lady who looks exactly like Yubaba?
In Four Weddings And A Funeral, who dies of a heart attack at the wedding of Hamish and Carrie?
In Back To The Future Part Two, who plays Marlene McFly?
Of the Star Wars sequel trilogy, which movie was NOT directed by J. J. Abrams?
Who plays a blind person in both John Wick 4 and Rogue One, the Star Wars spinoff?
Which movie was released earlier, Avengers: Infinity War or 1917 ?
Which movie had a higher initial gross, Avatar or Zootopia?
How many long films did Christopher Nolan direct between 2000 and 2010?
How many movies did Kazunari Ninomiya act in between 2000 and 2010?
How many movies did Leelee Sobieski act in between 2000 and 2010?
Who was born earlier? Natalie Portman or Leelee Sobieski
Who won the Academy Award for Best Actress more times, Katharine Hepburn or Audrey Hepburn?
Who won the Academy Award for Best Actress more times, Grace Kelly or Ingrid Bergman?
How many films in the Pirates of the Caribbean series were released between 2000 and 2010?
Which movie had a higher box office, May 18 (Hwaryeohan Hyooga) or 12.12: The Day (Seourui bom)?
In Gladiator (2000), who plays the Roman emperor Commodus?
In The Silence of the Lambs (1991), what food is Hannibal Lecter famously associated with when he describes eating a census taker?
In Finding Nemo (2003), what kind of fish is Dory?
In The Shawshank Redemption (1994), Andy Dufresne escapes from prison through what object in his cell wall?
Which actor played both Magneto in the X-Men films and Gandalf in The Lord of the Rings trilogy?
In Casablanca (1942), Rick Blaine owns a nightclub. What is the name of the actor who portrayed this nightclub owner?
How many Academy Awards did Slumdog Millionaire (2008) win?
Actor Bill Paxton appeared in both Titanic and Aliens. Which film featured him as Brock Lovett?
In the Harry Potter series, how many total players are on the field at the start of a Quidditch match?
How many years apart were the theatrical releases of Avatar and Avengers: Endgame?
What is the nickname of Lots-o'-Huggin' Bear from Toy Story?
What is the slogan of Monsters, Inc. in the movie?
How many of the first five Pixar feature films were directed by John Lasseter?
How many days passed between the US premiere of "Toy Story" and the US premiere of "Toy Story 4"?
In the movie WALL-E, what is the code name for the secret directive received by AUTO, the Axiom's autopilot, which prohibits the return to Earth?
Who voiced Fillmore in Cars 2?
What was the first movie produced by Studio Ghibli?
What Ghibli movie character made a cameo appearance in Toy Story 3?
What was the first animated movie to win the Golden Bear (Goldener Bär)?
How many movies produced by Studio Ghibli since 2000 have been directed by Hayao Miyazaki?
By the end of August 2025, how many Marvel Avengers series movies are there?
In the movie, the day after tomorrow, how many helicopters were sent to rescue the British royal family from Balmoral Castle?
In which movie of The Fast & the Furious series, did the "God's Eye" first appear?
How many mainline films of The Fast & the Furious series did Justin Lin work as a screenwriter?
Which The Fast & the Furious movie had the higher worldwide box office, F9 or Fast X?
In Interstellar, what is the full name of Joseph Cooper's daughter?
In Interstellar, what is the nick name of Joseph Cooper's daughter?
In Interstellar, how old is Joseph Cooper's daughter before Joseph started his mission?
By the end of August 2025, what is the most recent movie directed by the director of Interstellar?
What is the first film to be released in Dolby Vision format in Dolby Cinema?
In The Empire Strikes Back, on which planet did the Rebel Alliance first establish their base?
In the Star Wars universe, who first discovered the Jedi that wields two white lightsabers and brought her to the Jedi Temple?
In Rogue One, what was Chirrut Îmwe repeating before he died?
Name the actor who played a Jedi in Star Wars: Episode III – Revenge of the Sith and then played in Avengers of MCU.
In Star Wars, on which planet did Han Solo die?
In the first three MCU Spider-Man movies, what is the common word in their subtitles?
In Rogue One, what is Jyn Erso's nickname?
In The Empire Strikes Back, what kind of giant vehicle did the empire use to attack the rebel base?
Which Star Wars spinoff movie is more successful, Solo or Rogue One?
In the most successful Star Wars spinoff movie, who killed the characters that are played by Chinese actors?
